curation_notes: The patch commit (3905f03df) introduces saltV2 using random_bytes(16) as a cryptographically secure replacement for the original salt generated by uniqid(). It modifies encrypt_decrypt() in objects/functions.php to always prefer saltV2, adds checkAndCreateSaltV2() in objects/functionsSecurity.php to auto-upgrade existing installations, and calls it from objects/include_config.php. Locations derived from both the Talos advisory (TALOS-2023-1900) which explicitly identifies install/checkConfiguration.php as the source of the weak salt generation, and the patch diff which fixes the encrypt_decrypt() function in objects/functions.php. The advisory reference commit 15fed957fb is the confirmed vulnerable version, not the patch.
